title: attestation-results.json
description: Phase 7 Evidence output: Machine-readable verdict per control after CLI execution. Produced AFTER command execution. Each result includes verdict, command, exit code, stdout/stderr size, predicate evaluation, and elapsed time.

evidence_run_id.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when evidence collection started

stack_id.description: CloudFormation stack ARN targeted by probes

overall_verdict.description: Aggregate verdict: PASS if all CLI-validatable controls passed, FAIL if any failed, ERROR if execution failed, PARTIAL if some controls errored

fail.description: Controls that failed CLI validation (predicate did not match expected)

not_cli_validatable.description: Controls that cannot be CLI-validated (template-time, policy-only, etc.)

error.description: Controls where CLI execution errored (timeout, AWS API error, etc.)

pass_with_negative.description: Controls that passed both positive and negative tests (optional --with-negative-tests mode)

teardown_status.description: Phase 7 Step 11 teardown outcome. 'completed' = stack deleted successfully after evidence collection (default). 'skipped_keep_true' = intake.testing.keep was true, stack left alive for manual debugging. 'failed' = delete-stack returned non-zero; resources may remain (operator must clean up manually). 'not_attempted' = teardown step skipped (e.g., --replay mode reusing existing evidence).

_metadata.description: Optional metadata (environment, operator, git commit, etc.)

verdict.description: PASS if predicate matched expected, FAIL if mismatched, ERROR if execution failed, PASS_WITH_NEGATIVE if both positive and negative tests passed

command_argv.description: Argv array of the executed command (verbatim from cli-commands.json); programmatic consumers MUST read this rather than command_str.

command_str.description: shlex.join(command_argv) for human display only — used by render layer to populate the report tables.

exit_code.description: Process exit code (0 = success, non-zero = failure)

output_log.description: Relative path to raw stdout/stderr log file

predicate_result.description: True if predicate matched, False otherwise (only if verdict is PASS or FAIL)

predicate_evaluation.description: Human-readable description of predicate evaluation (e.g., 'result=arn:aws:kms:... matches not_null(@)')

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when command was executed

error_message.description: Error details if verdict is ERROR

reason_code.description: Machine-readable category for why this control cannot be CLI-validated.

reason.description: Explanation of why this control cannot be CLI-validated

supplemental_evidence.description: Relative path to IaC-time or deploy-time evidence file. Required when reason_code is 'iac-time-only' or 'policy-only-no-describe-api'.

iac_time_exit_code.description: Exit code from IaC-time validation (cfn-guard, opa, checkov) if applicable
